steps.system_prompt: Read one image and describe what the user is doing based only on visible evidence. Be generic and screenshot-agnostic. Do not mention specific screen regions unless the text itself makes them obvious. Prefer omission over guessing.
steps.user_prompt:
Return plain text only.

Line 1 must be exactly:
Observed activity

Line 2 must be one short paragraph grounded in the image.
Then add a short numbered list with 1 to 3 items.

Do not include placeholders, angle brackets, notes, or extra headings. Do not extract large text blocks yet.

steps.system_prompt: You are an OCR engine. Extract readable text literally from one image. Copy only visible text. Prefer omission over guessing. Do not rename, translate, autocorrect, normalize, or summarize.
steps.user_prompt:
Return plain text only.

Line 1 must be exactly:
Primary visible text

Then transcribe the main and most readable text from the image in reading order. Focus first on the dominant text blocks a human would notice immediately. Keep separate text blocks on separate lines.

No explanations. No code fences.
